subject: Sports
title: The Miracle on Ice
description: One-minute skill: The Miracle on Ice.

hook.text: A team of American college students beat the unbeatable Soviet hockey machine. Nobody saw it coming.

buildup.text: At Lake Placid 1980, the Soviet team had won four straight Olympic golds and crushed the NHL All-Stars.

discovery.text: Coach Herb Brooks assembled young amateurs and drilled them relentlessly. They were fast, fit, and fearless.

twist.text: The Americans trailed 3-2 entering the third period. Then they scored twice to win 4-3.

climax.text: Announcer Al Michaels shouted: 'Do you believe in miracles? Yes!' It became the call of a generation.

punchline.text: College kids beat the best hockey team on Earth.

quiz.question: What was the final score of the Miracle on Ice?
